void Profit(void) {
int choice;
float area;
    
if (Costcount == 0){
    printf("data unavailable\n");
    return;
}
printf("Available crops for profit calculation:\n");
for (int i=0;i<Costcount;i++) {
    printf("%d. %s\n", i + 1, cost[i].crop);
}
printf("0. Go back\n");

printf("Enter Crop Number:");
scanf("%d",&choice);
if (choice<=0 || choice>Costcount){
    printf("Invalid choice.\n");
    return;
}   
printf("Enter land area (in acres): ");
scanf("%f",&area);
if (area<=0.0){
    printf("Invalid area.\n");
    return;
}
int index=choice-1;
cost selectedCrop=Costdata[index];
float TotalSeedCost=selectedCrop.seedCost*area;
float TotalExpenses=selectedCrop.expenses*area;
float TotalCost=TotalSeedCost+TotalExpenses;
float TotalYield=selectedCrop.yield*area;
float MspRevenue=TotalYield*selectedCrop.msp;
float SellingRevenue=TotalYield*selectedCrop.sellingPrice;
float MspProfit=MspRevenue-TotalCost;
float SellingProfit=SellingRevenue-TotalCost;
printf("\nProfit for %s(%.2f Acres)\n",selectedCrop.crop,area);
printf("Total Seed Cost:\t%.2f\n",TotalSeedCost);
printf("Total Expenses:\t%.2f\n",TotalExpenses);
printf("Total Investment:\t%.2f\n",TotalCost);
printf("Total Yield:\t%.2f\n",TotalYield);
printf("\n");
printf("Revenue (at MSP):\t%.2f\n",mspRevenue);
printf("Net Profit/Loss (MSP):\t%.2f\n",mspProfit);
printf("\n");
printf("Revenue (Market Price):\t%.2f\n",sellingRevenue);
printf("Net Profit/Loss (Market):\t%.2f\n",sellingProfit);
}
